# Security Policy

**DO NOT DISCLOSE SECURITY RELATED ISSUES PUBLICLY!**

If you find a security issue, please report it to the repository owner at
daniela@webcodingcafe.com.

Your report will be read and replied to as soon as possible.

***Note: This blog publishing application is in early development. It may
have security issues and bugs that need to be fixed during development. Please
do not use it in a production environment.***
